info.name: CV Processor API - Updated
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection for testing the CV Processing Application endpoints. This collection includes all API endpoints for file upload, CV processing, field extraction, validation, monitoring, and Ollama service management.

## Features:
- Complete API endpoint coverage (25+ endpoints)
- Automated test scenarios with CV samples
- Error handling and edge case testing
- Automatic requestId management
- Health checks and monitoring
- Ollama service health and administration
- Spring Boot Actuator endpoints
- Enhanced test scripts with better validation
- Performance testing capabilities

## Usage:
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Set the baseUrl variable (default: http://localhost:8080)
3. Run the test scenarios to validate the complete workflow
4. Use the CV-1.md and CV-2.md files for file upload tests
5. Check the Test Scenarios folder for comprehensive workflow testing
6. Use Ollama Health & Admin endpoints to monitor LLM service status

item.name: Health Checks

request.description: Basic health check endpoint to verify application is running and accessible.
Detailed health check with component status including database and LLM service status.
Spring Boot actuator health endpoint for comprehensive application health monitoring.

exec: pm.test('Actuator health response is valid', function () {

item.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring application status and component health.

item.name: File Upload

formdata.description: CV file to upload (PDF, DOC, DOCX). Use CV-1.md or CV-2.md for testing.

request.description: Upload a CV file for processing. Returns requestId for tracking the processing status.
Get the status of an uploaded file processing request. Use the requestId from the upload response.
Health check for file upload service to verify it's operational.

item.description: File upload and management endpoints for CV document processing.

item.name: CV Processing

request.description: Process uploaded CV and extract fields using LLM. This endpoint extracts Work Experience, Skills, Languages, and Profile information.
Get extracted fields for a processed CV. Returns Work Experience, Skills, Languages, and Profile information.
Health check for CV processing service to verify LLM integration is operational.

item.description: CV processing and field extraction endpoints using LLM technology.

item.name: Complete Processing

request.description: Complete CV processing: extract fields and validate against business rules. This is the main endpoint that combines extraction and validation.
Get complete processing result with extracted fields and validation results for a previously processed CV.

item.name: Test Scenarios
Full CV Processing Workflow

formdata.description: Marketing Manager CV - should fail validation (missing Java, GenAI)

request.description: Upload CV-1 (Marketing Manager) - expected to fail validation due to missing Java skills and GenAI interest.
Complete processing of CV-1 - should show validation failures for skills and profile.

exec: // CV-1 should fail validation (missing Java and GenAI)

formdata.description: Software Developer CV - should pass validation

request.description: Upload CV-2 (Software Developer) - expected to pass validation with Java skills and GenAI interest.
Complete processing of CV-2 - should show validation success for all fields.
Check metrics after processing both CVs to see validation success rates.

exec: // Expected: CV-1 should fail, CV-2 should pass
